vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn/phóng khoáng
vocab.example: To be a truly successful artist, one must possess an unbridled imagination to conceptualize things that don't yet exist.

vocab.meaning: một nghề nghiệp bấp bênh/không ổn định
vocab.example: While I admire painters, I've always viewed being an artist as a precarious profession with little financial security.
If I were an artist, digital illustration would be my preferred medium of expression due to its versatility.

vocab.meaning: sự tay nghề thủ công tỉ mỉ/khéo léo
vocab.example: I lack the meticulous craftsmanship required to produce high-quality sculptures that stand the test of time.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi một phản ứng/cảm xúc
vocab.example: The goal of any great artist is to evoke a response from the audience, whether it be joy, anger, or contemplation.

vocab.meaning: sự chính trực/liêm chính trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Many aspiring artists struggle to maintain their artistic integrity when faced with the pressure of commercial success.

vocab.meaning: tiên phong/mới lạ và táo bạo
vocab.example: I am fascinated by avant-garde artists who challenge social norms through their provocative installations.

vocab.meaning: mắt nhìn tinh tường các chi tiết nhỏ
vocab.example: My friends say I have a keen eye for detail, which is essential for someone working in the fine arts.

vocab.meaning: sự diễn giải mang tính chủ quan
vocab.example: The beauty of being an artist is that your work is always open to the subjective interpretation of the viewer.

vocab.meaning: sự kiệt sức/cạn kiệt khả năng sáng tạo
vocab.example: I worry that turning my hobby into a career might lead to creative burnout, where I eventually lose my passion for drawing.
